message:
test(hook): Add comprehensive hook pipeline tests

Add unit and integration tests for the hook module covering:
- Classification confidence level verification
- Shell metacharacter rejection (pipes, background, redirects, subshells)
- Hook output protocol (allow/deny serialization)
- Mock daemon socket communication with request/response parsing
- URL encoding verification in daemon queries
- Fail-open behavior when daemon unavailable or config errors
- Worker config conversion from SelectionResponse

Completes acceptance criteria for hook tests including:
- Classification allow/deny and config threshold tests
- Integration tests validating daemon request parsing
- Mocked pipeline verifying fail-open semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
